title: BugEdited payload
description: Emitted when a bug's content fields change via forge_edit(bug) — title, problem_statement, acceptance_criteria, constraints, surface, source, etc. Status transitions emit BugResolved / BugReopened instead. SHA stamping emits BugStamped. When an edit touches the triage subset (severity / tags), BugTriaged ALSO emits alongside this event so triage-shape readers can filter by type without parsing updated_fields. updated_fields carries the list of changed field names; updated_values (added 2026-05-20 via T3 of agent-substrate-crud-retirement, §9.4) carries the post-edit values for each changed column so payload-only fold reconstruction can rebuild proj_current_bugs without re-reading the CRUD row.

updated_fields.description: Snake-case names of the bug fields that changed in this edit. At least one entry — a no-op edit must not emit this event.

updated_values.description: Added 2026-05-20 via T3 of agent-substrate-crud-retirement (§9.4 audit finding). Map of changed-column-name → new value. Keys mirror updated_fields exactly; values carry the post-edit content for each column so the projection fold can reconstruct proj_current_bugs from payload alone (T5's contract). Optional for backward compatibility with pre-T3 events; once T5 lands, every new event carries this. Value types follow each column's storage form (string for most; arrays accepted where the column joins a multi-bullet list).
